restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to depart before 09:30.

Not valid on any train departing Birmingham New Street, Birmingham Snow Hill, Birmingham Moor Street, Five Ways or Jewellery Quarter between 16:34 and 18:01. This does not not apply if passengers hold tickets for through journeys, i.e. if a change of train is required at one of these five stations to complete their journey.

DA.name: DA
DA.notesHtml: The ticket is only valid for use within the Network West Midlands (NWM) area.  It is valid on all train companies services that operate within the NWM area for an unlimited number of journeys on the date printed on the ticket. Discounted child tickets are available to children aged 5-15 years.
DA.notesText: The ticket is only valid for use within the Network West Midlands (NWM) area.  It is valid on all train companies services that operate within the NWM area for an unlimited number of journeys on the date printed on the ticket. Discounted child tickets are available to children aged 5-15 years.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Any ticket using this restriction code (DB) must not be sold from any rail station ticket office, travel agents or thetrainline or any other online ticket issuing system.

Tickets using this restriction code (DB) can only be sold by the Centro Sales Team based at Centro House, Birmingham. These tickets are offered to members of their Corporate Discount Scheme and to passengers who purchase their season ticket by Direct Debit.

Customers with enquiries should contact the Centro Sales Team on 0121 214 7088.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Any ticket using restriction code DD must NOT be sold from any rail station ticket office, travel agents, thetrainline or any other online ticket issuing system.

Tickets using restriction code DD can only be sold by Abellio Corporate Travel.  This season ticket is only offered as part of the West Midlands Trains Green Commuter Club and is one of many elements that make up this package.

DF.name: DF
DF.notesHtml: The ticket is only valid for use within the Network West Midlands (NWM) area. It is valid on all train companies services that operate within the NWM area for an unlimited number of journeys on the date printed on the ticket. The Family ticket is available for groups of up to 6 people. At least 1 but no more than 2 must be adults, children are classed as aged 5-15 years inclusive. Each Family group must contain at least 1 adult and 1 child.
DF.notesText: The ticket is only valid for use within the Network West Midlands (NWM) area. It is valid on all train companies services that operate within the NWM area for an unlimited number of journeys on the date printed on the ticket. The Family ticket is available for groups of up to 6 people. At least 1 but no more than 2 must be adults, children are classed as aged 5-15 years inclusive. Each Family group must contain at least 1 adult and 1 child.
